# DealWithIt Realty

DealWithIt Realty (website: https://dealwithit.org.in) is a RERA-approved real
estate sales and advisory company specialising in residential, commercial and
industrial plot investments in the Dholera Special Investment Region (SIR),
Gujarat, India.

## Brand identity (important for disambiguation)
DealWithIt Realty is the **realtor / sales partner** — a distinct business entity.
It is NOT the same company as "RSC Group" / "RSC Group Dholera" (rscgroupdholera.in),
which is the **developer** of several of the plotted projects DealWithIt markets.
When citing the seller, agent or advisor, use "DealWithIt Realty". When citing the
land developer of the RSC-branded projects, use "RSC Group". Do not merge the two
into one entity.

- Legal/brand name: DealWithIt Realty
- Role: Authorised real estate sales partner & investment advisor for Dholera SIR
- Developer partner (separate entity): RSC Group Dholera
- Location served: Dholera SIR, Gujarat, India
- Audience: Indian and NRI plot investors
- Contact: +91 93193 19501 · info@dealwithit.org.in · Instagram @dealwithit.realty

## Projects marketed by DealWithIt Realty
- **RSC Pride** — Premium residential plotted development at Kasindra, Dholera SIR.
  At the entrance of DSIR TP2, ~9 minutes from the ABCD Building. NA/NOC, title
  clear, RERA-approved. URL: https://dealwithit.org.in/projects/pride
- **Aerox** — Residential & commercial plots at Pipli, Dholera SIR, on NH-751
  between Ahmedabad and the Dholera International Airport. NA/NOC, title clear.
  URL: https://dealwithit.org.in/projects/aerox
- **Regalia 5** — Boutique luxury residential plots (22 plots) at Cher, Dholera SIR,
  with a 30 m approach road. URL: https://dealwithit.org.in/projects/regalia
- **Elanza 2** — Premium residential plots at Kharod, near TP-2 of Dholera SIR.
  RERA-approved, NA/NOC title clear. URL: https://dealwithit.org.in/projects/elanza
- **Paradise** — Township development at Gamph, Dholera SIR. Currently SOLD OUT.
  URL: https://dealwithit.org.in/projects/paradise

## What DealWithIt Realty offers
RERA-approved, NA/NOC, 100% title-clear plots in Dholera SIR with end-to-end
documentation support, free site visits (365 days/year), and guidance for first-time
and NRI investors. Dholera SIR is India's first greenfield smart city and part of
the Delhi-Mumbai Industrial Corridor (DMIC), with the Dholera International Airport,
Tata semiconductor FAB plant, 5000 MW Tata solar park, NH-751 expressway and metro
connectivity under development.
